en_title: God of War Laufey Director 'Understands' Skepticism Following Reveal, but Hopes Fans Give It a Chance
cn_title: 《战神：劳菲》总监回应玩家质疑
subtitle: 理解但不认同
opus_summary: 《战神：劳菲》总监回应玩家质疑，希望粉丝给予机会。游戏以劳菲为主角，沿用一镜到底风格。Lawrence表示理解担忧，但强调这是全新冒险，奎托斯仍是核心。

paragraphs.en: God of War Laufey's director, Ariel Lawrence, has addressed "skepticism" following the game's reveal, hoping fans give it a chance.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：劳菲》总监Ariel Lawrence回应了游戏公布后部分玩家的「质疑」，希望粉丝能给予机会。

paragraphs.en: God of War Laufey was revealed as the big "one last thing" at this week's PlayStation State of Play and while there was a lot of enthusiasm, there was also some backlash. Some of that comes from the fact that Faye, Kratos' wife, is the main character and not the titular God of War himself. Others believe that the game isn't enough of a departure from Kratos' journey, as it utilizes the same one-shot camera style as the last two games.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：劳菲》在本周PlayStation State of Play上作为压轴「最后惊喜」公布，虽然反响热烈，但也引来了一些争议。部分原因在于主角是奎托斯的妻子劳菲，而非标题中的战神本人。另一些人则认为游戏与奎托斯的旅程差异不大，因为它沿用了前两部作品的一镜到底拍摄风格。

paragraphs.en: Lawrence told GameSpot she sees this story as something new and is hopeful fans will give it a chance.
paragraphs.cn: Lawrence在接受GameSpot采访时表示，她认为这是一个全新的故事，希望粉丝能给予机会。

paragraphs.en: "I understand the skepticism," she said. "I hope they will give it a chance and be excited to play. I think for me it’s just, is it fun? Is it an adventure that I haven’t been on before? And I think the biggest thing is just, for us, is how can we hold onto the surprise? I think it’s just so hard to be surprised today. Everybody always knows exactly how it’s going to play out. So I’m hopeful that this is a place where we can still have some mystery."
paragraphs.cn: 「我理解大家的质疑，」她说道，「但我希望他们能给予机会，并期待游玩。对我来说，关键在于：它好玩吗？这是一段我从未体验过的冒险吗？我认为最重要的是，我们如何保留惊喜感？如今要让玩家感到惊喜实在太难了。每个人似乎都能准确预测剧情走向。所以我希望这款游戏能保留一些神秘感。」

paragraphs.en: In a separate interview wtih GamesRadar , Lawrence acknowledged that fans have a deep connection to God of War, which typically revolves around Kratos. Even Domino's Pizza of all places chimed in to talk about how the lack of Kratos in a God of War game feels wrong . However, she views the intense response to the game as a positive, as it means people really care about this franchise.
paragraphs.cn: 在另一次接受GamesRadar采访时，Lawrence承认粉丝与《战神》系列有着深厚的情感纽带，该系列通常围绕奎托斯展开。甚至连达美乐披萨都插话表示，一款《战神》游戏没有奎托斯感觉不对劲。不过，她认为玩家对游戏的强烈反应是积极的，因为这表明人们真的很在意这个系列。

paragraphs.en: "We have to honor that everybody has their connection with a God of War story, and I think that a lot of people have a lot of different opinions, so some of them are hesitant, some of them are all in, and I think for me, I'm just happy that everybody cares about this," Lawrence said. "I think if we had put something out and people had been like, 'It's okay,' I think it would have been more disheartening. But if people have feelings, great, I hope to win over the skeptics in the future."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们必须尊重每个人与《战神》故事的情感联系，我认为很多人都有不同的看法，有些人犹豫不决，有些人全力支持，而对我来说，我很高兴大家都很在意这款游戏，」Lawrence说道。「我认为如果我们推出一个作品，大家的反应是『还行吧』，那才更令人沮丧。但如果大家有强烈的感受，那很好，我希望未来能赢得那些质疑者的心。」

paragraphs.en: Sony Santa Monica has already confirmed that there are many more stories for Kratos on the horizon and he remains a vital part of the franchise, so Laufey won't be "replacing" him. It's unclear what's next for his story, but Laufey may be the end of the Norse saga. Ragnarok seemed to put a bow on that era of the franchise, but Laufey runs in parallel to the last two games, so it's possible this will be the true conclusion and maybe set up what's next for Kratos.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼圣莫尼卡工作室已确认，奎托斯未来还有更多故事，他仍是系列的重要组成部分，因此劳菲不会「取代」他。目前尚不清楚奎托斯的故事将如何发展，但《劳菲》可能是北欧传奇的终章。《诸神黄昏》似乎为那个时代画上了句号，但《劳菲》与之前两部作品并行发生，因此它可能是真正的结局，并为奎托斯的下一步故事埋下伏笔。

paragraphs.en: IGN also had an extensive conversation with Lawrence and Cory Barlog, the director of 2018's God of War and head of creative at Sony Santa Monica, where we learned a bunch of new details about the studio's plan for the game and God of War as a whole. Be sure to check it out, as it may answer some lingering questions you have for the game.
paragraphs.cn: IGN还与Lawrence以及2018年《战神》总监、索尼圣莫尼卡创意总监Cory Barlog进行了一次深入对话，我们从中了解到了工作室对这款游戏以及整个《战神》系列规划的大量新细节。请务必查看，它可能会解答你对游戏的一些疑问。

paragraphs.en: God of War Laufey will release on PS5 at an undisclosed date in the future.
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：劳菲》将登陆PS5，发售日未定。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等娱乐内容。你可以在X平台@Cade_Onder找到他。
